  • Kruger Shalati - The Train on the Bridge

South Africa • Luxury safari hotel

Kruger Shalati - The Train on the Bridge

A distinctive Kruger stay built around restored train carriages on the Selati Bridge over the Sabie River.

★ 4.7 519 reviews
Image slot Stay Kruger Shalati

About this stay

Kruger Shalati is a realistic high-impact choice for travelers who want the lodge to be part of the experience, not just a bed between game drives.

Why it works for this route

It is premium and highly specific. Budget-focused travelers may prefer SANParks rest camps or lodges outside the park.

Amenities

  • Bridge setting
  • Game drives
  • Sabie River views
  • Pool

Best nearby attraction

Kruger National Park is the clearest anchor for this stay.

Booking path

From $800 / night

Skukuza, Kruger National Park

Check stay options

Nearby attractions
